content.full_text:
Rick Cook, Councilmember  
City of Santa Paula  
970 East Ventura Street  
Santa Paula, CA 93060

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-03-161

Dear Mr. Cook:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act. Your request concerns your potential participation, as a member of the City of Santa Paula City Council, in certain pending decisions concerning development of Fagan Canyon. Specifically, you are concerned whether you have a disqualifying conflict of interest, based on the proximity of your present and former principal residence to the proposed boundaries of the Fagan Canyon Project.

On August 20, 2003, Mr. Karl Berger, City Attorney for the City of Santa Paula, submitted a request for formal written advice (our File No. A-03-191) on behalf of yourself, Mayor John Procter, Vice-Mayor Gabino Aguirre and Council members Mary-Ann Krause and Ray Luna concerning the Fagan Canyon Project. Since our written advice to Mr. Berger, which is being provided concurrent with this letter, fully addresses the matters you raise in your individual request, it is unnecessary to issue you separate advice. Thus by this letter we are withdrawing your individual request for advice.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca  
General Counsel

By: Kenneth L. Glick  
Counsel, Legal Division
